vocab.meaning: thưởng ngoạn, say sưa ngắm nhìn thứ gì đó đẹp đẽ
vocab.example: I love heading to the coast just to feast my eyes on the horizon and capture it with my camera.

vocab.word: a picture paints a thousand words
vocab.meaning: một bức ảnh thay cho ngàn lời nói
vocab.example: I find it hard to describe the beauty of the Alps, but as they say, a picture paints a thousand words.
Even without a camera, I can still see those rolling hills in my mind's eye, but I prefer taking a photo to be sure.

vocab.meaning: vật báu, thứ được yêu chuộng nhất
vocab.example: This vintage camera is the apple of my eye; I use it exclusively for high-quality landscape photography.

vocab.word: take a stroll down memory lane
vocab.meaning: ôn lại những kỷ niệm cũ
vocab.example: I take scenery pictures so that years later, I can look at them and take a stroll down memory lane.

vocab.meaning: ở nơi hẻo lánh, ít người biết đến
vocab.example: I enjoy taking photos of places that are off the beaten track where the scenery remains untouched.

vocab.meaning: đắm chìm trong khoảnh khắc hiện tại
vocab.example: Sometimes I get so lost in the moment while looking through the lens that I forget everything else around me.

vocab.meaning: nhìn nhận vấn đề một cách bao quát (nghĩa bóng); chụp toàn cảnh (nghĩa đen vui nhộn)
vocab.example: Photography teaches me to see the big picture and appreciate the vastness of nature's beauty.
I don't mind waiting at a snail's pace for hours just to get the perfect lighting for a landscape shot.

vocab.meaning: nín thở vì kinh ngạc/hồi sức
vocab.example: The view from the cliff top made me catch my breath, and I knew I had to snap a photo immediately.
